title: John's Weekly System
subtitle: A live weekly tracker for your recurring Monday to Sunday schedule.
summary: Use this as the live week tracker, not as a dated one-off plan.
NLP/AI is now the main learning track. Deep learning is no longer part of the recurring system.
The ML project runs every day except Sunday. Career ops run six days a week. Content stays batched.

days.name: Monday
days.focus: NLP/AI foundation plus ML project momentum

blocks.title: NLP / AI core session
blocks.desc: Study the current module, take notes, and implement at least one key idea.

blocks.title: ML project feature work
blocks.desc: Push the credit default project forward with real implementation work.

blocks.title: Applications and outreach
blocks.desc: Send tailored applications and a few focused messages.

blocks.title: Gym or movement
blocks.desc: Keep the body slot protected.

blocks.title: Statistics with Python
blocks.desc: Work through one concept cluster slowly and code along.

blocks.title: ML project experimentation
blocks.desc: Run experiments, compare results, and note what changed.

blocks.title: C++ focused session
blocks.desc: One topic at a time. Keep it steady.

blocks.title: Product or freelance push
blocks.desc: Build something small or respond to real opportunities.

blocks.title: NLP / AI implementation
blocks.desc: Turn this week's concepts into code or examples.

blocks.title: ML project system improvement
blocks.desc: Work on reproducibility, tracking, evaluation flow, or cleanup.

blocks.title: TikTok planning
blocks.desc: Plan the weekly post. No recording yet.

blocks.title: Applications and follow-ups
blocks.desc: Keep the campaign moving.

days.name: Thursday
days.focus: Stats, ML project, and C++ consistency

blocks.title: Statistics with Python
blocks.desc: Second stats session of the week.

blocks.title: ML project training or evaluation
blocks.desc: Use this slot for training, comparisons, or metrics review.

blocks.title: C++ session
blocks.desc: Keep the streak alive with another calm block.

blocks.title: Outreach block
blocks.desc: Refine positioning and keep the pipeline warm.

blocks.title: NLP / AI consolidation
blocks.desc: Review the week's learning and set up next week cleanly.

blocks.title: ML project checkpoint
blocks.desc: Ship one visible improvement and log the progress.

blocks.title: Applications and campaign review
blocks.desc: Check what moved and what needs another push.

blocks.title: Weekly review
blocks.desc: Short reset: wins, misses, and adjustments.

days.name: Saturday
days.focus: Batched content plus C++ and build time

blocks.title: TikTok record and post
blocks.desc: Batch the weekly post here so content stays contained.

blocks.title: YouTube planning or scripting
blocks.desc: Develop ideas and scripts in batches.

blocks.title: C++ study session
blocks.desc: Third weekly C++ block.

blocks.title: Product or freelance build block
blocks.desc: Ship something real that can create leverage.

blocks.title: Statistics review session
blocks.desc: Review notes and settle the week's stats concepts.

blocks.title: NLP / AI preview
blocks.desc: Light preview only so Monday opens cleanly.

blocks.title: Weekly reset
blocks.desc: Look ahead and protect the next week from chaos.
